faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: I'm a complete beginner, is SeenYT easy to use?
faq.a1: Extremely easy! We designed the interface specifically for non-tech users. There's a 3-step hands-on process, you just follow the instructions to create your video.
faq.q2: Can SeenYT help my videos go trending?
faq.a2: Yes! Our tools use AI to analyze YouTube's algorithm, find trending topics, and guide you on optimization (SEO, Thumbnail, Script) to maximize your chances of being recommended.
faq.q3: Can I monetize videos created with SeenYT?
faq.a3: Absolutely. You own 100% of the copyright for videos you create. Many of our users have enabled monetization and are earning revenue from YouTube and Affiliate programs.
